etymology: Rachmael = mercy of God; ben Applebaum = son of the apple tree
wordplay_note: God's mercy from the apple tree — mercy from the garden
card_description: Rachmael ben Applebaum (meaning "Rachmael = mercy of God; ben Applebaum = son of the apple tree") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Lies Inc.*. Heir to a spaceship line who investigates whether the colony world Whale's Mouth is real. Name note: God's mercy from the apple tree — mercy from the garden. The seeker who must physically travel to discover what teleportation conceals. First appears in *Lies Inc.*.

reference.brief: Heir to a spaceship line who investigates whether the colony world Whale's Mouth is real
